items.title: Port pro feature/pr/pr.merged commands to OpenCode
items.description: Translate /pro:feature, /pro:pr, and /pro:pr.merged from Claude Code command semantics to OpenCode command semantics, preserving workflow behavior and documenting every concession.

items.title: Plan ccplugins command port continuation
items.description: Resume the Claude Code plugin command porting effort by cataloging which commands already exist in OpenCode and which remain outstanding so the next batch can be selected.

items.title: Align install-handoff symlink remediation guidance
items.description: Update the Makefile install-handoff target so that when the symlink points to an unexpected target it emits the same explicit recovery hint as install-colon (e.g., suggest running make uninstall) before exiting with an error, matching coderabbit review feedback.

items.title: Add make help target
items.description: Add a GNU-style "make help" target that prints a concise usage summary of the supported install/uninstall/status commands so users can discover them quickly.

items.title: Unify command and plugin installs
items.description: Refactor the Makefile so `make install` runs both command and plugin installers, introduce `install-commands`/`install-plugins` plus matching uninstall targets, and update docs/help accordingly.

items.title: Add session handoff check command
items.description: Create a /pro command that writes or verifies .plan/session-handoff.md so users can confirm their session handoff snapshot is current before ending work.
